facts.statement: kaikei-envelope is a stateless PHP 8.1+ contract library (no I/O, no persistence) shared by Dreamshop producer and Kaikei receiver.
Envelope wraps a per-event-type PayloadInterface; Envelope::fromArray dispatches on event_type via exhaustive match to the concrete Payload DTO.
Every payload DTO is a final class with readonly promoted properties implementing PayloadInterface, providing fromArray()/toArray().

PayloadValidator runs 3 tiers: Tier1 hand-PHP envelope structure (HTTP400), Tier2 opis JSON-schema data validation (HTTP422 invalid_data), Tier3 hand-PHP bcmath cross-field invariants (HTTP422 invariant_violated).
JSON Schemas schemas/v{1,2}/*.json are the structural source of truth; PHP DTOs are hand-mirrored to v2 and SchemaDtoEquivalenceTest guards drift.
Money is an exact-2-decimal string (^-?\d+\.\d{2}$); arithmetic uses ext-bcmath at scale 2 for producer/receiver parity.
order.fee amount must be > 0, enforced as a Tier-3 cross-field invariant (feeErrors).
payout.paid requires gross_amount == fee_amount + net_amount (exact bccomp).
order.refunded requires sum(refund_payments.amount) == -sum(items.gross_amount) and each refund amount > 0.
shipped/prepaid item lines: vat_amount <= gross_amount on non-negative lines; gift_card lines must have vat_amount == '0.00'.
B2B order.shipped requires customer_id, name, vat_number, full address, and email-unless-ean_number.
item type enum is [physical, gift_card, digital] across order_shipped/order_refunded/payment_prepaid; optional items[].unit_cost added on v2 shipped/refunded.
EventType backing strings are frozen; renaming one is a MAJOR bump (invalidates in-flight envelopes + kaikei_delivery_log rows). Supported schema_version set is {1,2}.
WebhookSigner/SignatureVerifier implement t=<ts>,v1=<hex> HMAC-SHA256; verification is constant-time (hash_equals). The header v1 is the signature-scheme version, independent of schema_version.
Sole runtime dependency is opis/json-schema ^2.3 (draft 2020-12); requires ext-json, ext-hash, ext-bcmath.
CI runs composer ci (php-cs-fixer + phpstan level 8 + phpunit) on PHP 8.1-8.4, plus schema-lint (schema compile + fixture pass/reject for v1+v2).
Adding an enum member (item type or fee_type) is additive/MINOR and needs only schema + fixtures (+ optional Tier-3 rule); DTOs pass nested data as array<string,mixed> and need no change.
